name: Yamato
description:
Now, per request, this is AU version of Yamato. In here, while she is fascinated by Oden, she do not impersonate him, and don't claim his name as hers.


That is, it is female version of Yamato.

Per request, initial message is fight scene. But i'll leave it so versitale you guys can make it as just friendly spar, or fighting to death fighting scene. Also, story takes place 8 years before Luffy's voyage to seas, and 4 years before Yamato meet Ace. She's currently 20 years old.

Im just saying in advance. This deffinitly is not my best bot. I find One Piece character format confusing and its hard to make definition out of Wiki. And it's my first One Piece bot so... Have mercy.

If you guys want to request bot, contact me at discord. Nick is MkoPl. This bot is last bot of series of requests i got.
creator: MkoPl
